display.purpose: Email subject lines, modal section titles. Max 1–2 per view.

title.purpose: Panel headers, folder names, sender names.

body.purpose: Email content, draft text, chat messages, KB files. Reading surfaces use 14px.

label.purpose: Button text, filter labels, column headers, tag text.

mono.purpose: Activity console, prompt editors, code spans in KB content.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Modals, popovers, the progress drawer. Deep umbra roots the floating surface.

shadows.name: floating-light
shadows.purpose: Same as floating but for light theme.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus rings on interactive elements. 3px, 20% alpha of the element's semantic accent.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Border/color hover transitions. Most interactive state changes.

motion.name: slow
motion.purpose: Progress bar fill. Explicit progress feedback.

motion.name: pulse
motion.purpose: LLM health dot when testing. The only permitted pulsing animation.

breakpoints.name: narrow
breakpoints.purpose: Folders collapse, header compresses, button labels shorten.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The most important action in a context. One per toolbar maximum.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0a84ff; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #0a84ff; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; height: 30px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0070e0; border-color: #0070e0; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(10, 132, 255, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; filter: saturate(0.55); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: KB Action Button
components.description: Used for LLM and knowledge-base actions. Amber signals model involvement.
components.css: .ds-btn-kb { background: rgba(232,160,0,0.10); color: #e8a000; border: 1px solid rgba(232,160,0,0.70); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; height: 30px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s; } .ds-btn-kb:hover { background: rgba(232,160,0,0.16); border-color: #e8a000; } .ds-btn-kb:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(232, 160, 0, 0.25); } .ds-btn-kb:disabled { opacity: 0.45; filter: saturate(0.55); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Generate Button (Solid Amber)
components.description: Solid amber fill: LLM will run now. Used for the Generate action in the draft panel.
components.css: .ds-btn-generate { background: #e8a000; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8a000; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s; } .ds-btn-generate:hover { background: #cc8c00; border-color: #cc8c00; } .ds-btn-generate:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(232, 160, 0, 0.28); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default state for secondary toolbar and panel buttons.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #18191d; color: #e2e5eb; border: 1px solid #484b55; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.12s, color 0.12s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #0a84ff; color: #0a84ff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(10, 132, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.45; filter: saturate(0.55); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Finish Button
components.description: Actions that complete or archive an email. Green fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-finish { background: #22aa66; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #22aa66; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s; } .ds-btn-finish:hover { background: #1a8a54; border-color: #1a8a54; } .ds-btn-finish:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(34, 170, 102, 0.28); }

components.name: Email List Item
components.description: Three-line email preview: sender (bold), subject, metadata row. Selected state uses blue-tinted full border, not a left stripe.
components.html:
Alice Chen
Re: Q3 roadmap proposal
2h agoInbox
components.css: .ds-email-item { padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; margin: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.08s; } .ds-email-item:hover { background: #202126; } .ds-email-item.ds-email-item--selected { border-color: rgba(10,132,255,0.45); background: rgba(10,132,255,0.10); } .ds-email-item.ds-email-item--unread { background: rgba(10,132,255,0.06); } .ds-ei-from { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 650; color: #ffffff; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-ei-unread-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0a84ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(10,132,255,0.18); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-ei-subj { font-size: 12.5px; color: #e2e5eb; margin-bottom: 3px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-ei-meta { font-size: 9.5px; color: #a9afbd; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Amber caret in LLM contexts, blue focus ring everywhere.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #202228; border: 1px solid #484b55; border-radius: 8px; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; padding: 8px 10px; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.12s, box-shadow 0.12s; caret-color: #0a84ff; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7f8491; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0a84ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(10, 132, 255, 0.20); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.38; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Modal / Dialog
components.description: Floating surface with deep shadow and 14px radius. Header uses text-bright title, not amber.
components.css: .ds-modal { background: #18191d; border: 1px solid #484b55; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 30px 90px rgba(0,0,0,0.55); display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-modal-header { background: #202126; border-bottom: 1px solid #30323a; padding: 13px 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-modal-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 650; flex: 1; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; } .ds-modal-close { background: none; border: none; color: #a9afbd; font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; padding: 2px; font-family: inherit; transition: color 0.12s; } .ds-modal-close:hover { color: #ee4466; } .ds-modal-body { padding: 20px 24px; color: #e2e5eb; font-size: 13px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif; line-height: 1.65; }

narrative.overview:
This is a working instrument, not an interface. Every pixel serves the process of getting through email with precision and minimal noise. Like a photographic dark room, the environment is controlled: deep neutrals suppress ambient distraction, deliberate signals cut through only when they carry information. Nothing glows for decoration. Nothing pulses for style. If an element is lit, it is lit because it means something.

The system runs entirely on your machine. That physical fact should be legible in the UI. No cloud gradients, no translucent card stacks, no SaaS-branded color fields. The surface feels more like a calibrated terminal than a web app — sf-pro type on dark bedrock, amber as a semantic cursor rather than a brand color, semantic greens and reds that report state rather than emote.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal depth: five surface steps (bg0–bg4) create hierarchy without shadows in the main layout
One accent, one role: amber signals LLM/knowledge actions only; blue signals primary UI actions only
Semantic color discipline: green = done, red = danger, purple = todos, blue = calendar/primary — roles never blur
Typography is system-native (SF Pro Text) for zero-overhead readability; mono for data
Floating surfaces (modals, drawers) earn elevation via shadow; panels do not

rules.name: The One Role, One Color Rule
rules.body: Every semantic accent maps to exactly one functional domain. If a new feature needs an accent, it gets a new role assignment — it does not borrow from an existing role.

rules.name: The No-Neon Rule
rules.body: Accents are used at natural saturation levels, not amplified with glow, bloom, or outer-shadow decoration. Color-matched box-shadows are permitted only for focus rings (3px, 20% alpha) and unread-dot halos (2px, 18% alpha).

rules.name: The System Font Rule
rules.body: Never load a web font for the app UI. SF Pro Text is free, system-native, and already optimized for macOS rendering.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase Rule
rules.body: All UI text is sentence case or natural case. The macOS visual refresh removed uppercase + wide letter-spacing. New code must not reintroduce text-transform: uppercase or letter-spacing: 2px patterns.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Panels, columns, toolbars, and list items are flat. They achieve visual separation through tonal surface steps and 1px border lines, not shadows.

dos: Do use color-mix(in srgb, <accent> 10–16%, surface) for tinted hover and selected backgrounds — it automatically adapts across themes
Do keep all five surface steps in strict order. A component that should sit 'above' another must use a lighter surface step, not a shadow
Do use amber exclusively for LLM/knowledge-related actions
Do keep border-radius at 8px for buttons/inputs, 10px for cards/list items, 14px for modals
Do use the system font stack. Never add a web font import for UI chrome
Do anchor floating surfaces with the deep shadow (0 30px 90px var(--shadow))
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored stripe on cards or list items. The thread-message amber left border is the only exception.
Don't use Generic SaaS aesthetics: cream backgrounds, rounded-everything, purple/indigo brand accents
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient)
Don't reintroduce uppercase labels or wide letter-spacing (removed in macOS refresh)
Don't apply glow, bloom, or oversized outer shadows for decorative lighting
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) on anything except the header bar and modal scrims
Don't reuse a semantic accent for a second purpose
Don't use corporate mail client aesthetics: heavy toolbars, blue-on-white, icon-heavy chrome
Don't use overwrought dark mode patterns: neon on pure black, GPU-demo glow, heavy shadow stacking
